system.description: Sharp and/or Blunt; lethal or non-lethal. Opened parasol grants +2 Evade against projectiles and +1d10 Athletics to reduce falling damage.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 5: Equipment and Goods
